segments.text: Namaste! Mero dimaag kei alter cha bhanera ka-kaslai sanka lagya thiyo? (raise hands).
keywords: person raising hand crowd candid question
Nepali man waving smile warm portrait

segments.text: Kalai maile aaja samma jhukauna (grinning face) safal bhaye? Sankai huna diyena?
keywords: grinning face looking away satisfied smile
candid laugh caught in lie playful

segments.text: Mero dimaag alter cha! Ani aaja ma yesko pardafash garna chahanchu.
keywords: person revealing secret hand over heart

segments.text: Ma yastai janmeko tara maile ni bhakhar tha pako.
Aafai lai kasari thaha hune? Jun dimaag bhitra sadhai bhuichalo gai rahancha, usko lagi tehi nai ekmatra normal ho, taba tyo disorder jasto lagdaina.
keywords: confused mind cloudy thoughts visual metaphor
person with head in hands overwhelmed

segments.text: Tyo ta khali... failure jasto lagcha.
keywords: sad young man lonely bench failure

segments.text: Jastai 100 barsa agadi... Nepal ma na eye test thiyo, na chasma sajilai paainthiyo.
keywords: old Nepal village black and white

segments.text: Dherai manche haru blurry vision liyera janminthye... tara uniharulai tha hudaina thiyo.
keywords: blurry vision point of view artistic
out of focus face looking around

segments.text: Kinaki usle kahile pani clear dekheko chaina. Usko lagi duniya nai testai ho. Aankhai testai ho.
Ekchin arko manche ko aankha bata herna paako bhaye... Jhaskinthyo hola. Runthyo hola! (unblur).
"Eh... aru sab le ta clear dekhda raichan?"
keywords: young lady amazed hand covering face

segments.text: Hinda thes lagcha, ladcha ghuda ma ghau sadhaibhari sadhaibhari. Thukka (laugh)!!
keywords: messy bandaid on knee candid humor

segments.text: Ani khusi hunthyo hola chasma huncha thapayo bhane "Yo thik garna milne raicha!"
keywords: young man wears glasses happy sunlight

segments.text: Hospital gayo. Tara chasma ma ta sarkar le ban garya cha (shrug, idk hands) north-korea! khais! (laugh)
keywords: Nepali man laughing hands up disbelief

segments.text: Ghar farkyo - aba k garchhas? Sab lai bhanis. Excited bhayera.
Kasaile baal diyena. Kasaile naam pani suneko thiyena.
keywords: person speaking no one listening sad

segments.text: Aankha ko lagi aile testo chaina. Manasik samasya ko lagi aile pani testai cha.
keywords: metaphor eye vs mind mental health

segments.text: Ra mero case pani yastai nai cha.
Mero diagnosis kehi lai ekanta ma lagera bhane.
- ke ke na tha paincha. K ho tyo? Sunya pani thiye aaja samma.
- pranayam gar, dherai nasocha
- Testo kei hudaina, ta thik chhas
- malai bhanihalis aru kasailai nabhan, baulais bhanlan (laugh)
Haina ho ke. Patan le tesai bhancha hola ta?
- Taile tiniharu malai yasto cha bhanis hola, ani uniharu le ni ho ho bhandyo. Talai dawai bechna lai.
- hahaha patan kina gako, tya gaye pachi ta kei na kei dekhaihalcha ni
- ramro bahana pais taile aba
Thaha nabhaye chhin symptom lai character trait manincha.
Dimag ko user manual tehi dimag le lekhya huncha.
Teslai thaha hudaina ki tesma bug cha, teslai lagcha ki jindagi nai yastai ho.
keywords: bug in system metaphor person puzzled
life feels wrong but normal confusion

segments.text: Tapai lai dosh chaina. Maile pani sunya thiye na.
Yedi doctor le aafai aayera bhane pani manne thiye na.
Baru ultai yesle malai pagal bhanna khojeko bhanera risauthe?
What do u mean mero dimaag ma samasya cha? K ho ADHD bhanya?
keywords: what is ADHD text overlay portrait

segments.text: - Tapai main kaam ma focus garna saknu hunchha tara arko ma ghanta birsinuhunchha? "Eutai kura garirana jheu lagi halcha ni"
- Tapai dherai sensitive hunuhunchha? "Manche farak-farak hunchan."
- Tapai eka thau ma basna saknuhunna? "Energetic chu."
- Tapai time manage garna saknuhunna? "Spontaneous chu."
- Tapai kaam aadha chodnuhunchha? "Perfectionist chu."
- Tapai kaam feri rahanu hunchha? "Naya kura man parcha."
- Tapai nikkai late sutnuhunchha? "Night owl chu."
keywords: night owl working late desk lamp

segments.text: - Tapai manche ko kura beech ma katnuhunchha? "Passionate chu."
- Tapai paisa manage garna saknuhunna? "Generous chu."
- Jo ko pani tapai sanga answer cha hai? "Budo chu ni ta."
- Tapai dherai bolnuhunchha? "Aajkal teti boldina."
- Overshare garne dar le hola haina? Dherai palta aafailai embarrass gari saknu bhayo. "(silence)".
Ajhai bhandai jau? Kunai pani jyotish bhanda majjale predict garna sakchu tapai ko past.
Ani upachar payena bhane tapai ko future pani. Tapai lai ADHD cha.
Dukha matra tragedy haina. Dukha ko naam raicha, samadhan raicha.
keywords: light at end of tunnel sunrise

segments.text: Bina chitti dukha paunu tragedy ho.
Kati manis ta kasturi mirga bhaye.. sabai tira khoje..
keywords: musk deer searching metaphor Nepal folklore

segments.text: Haat ko rekha, juna tara, nakshatra ani sani ko sadhe saat.
Bhetenan. Pakhnus!!
Sochnus ta tapai ko samasya aakash ma hola ki, tapai kai dimag vitra hola?
keywords: looking up at stars vs brain

segments.text: Tesaile dherai adhd vaeka haru... jindagi bhari ADHD liyera bachchan, dukha pauchan, thahai napaai marchan.
Khasgari hamro nepal jasto desh ma. Yaha
